# Mixing Systems, Inc.

> Industry-leading jet aeration and diffuser systems for municipal and industrial wastewater treatment. 40+ years of engineering excellence.

Address: 7058 Corporate Way, Dayton, Ohio 45459, USA · Phone: +1 937-435-7227 · Email: amit@mixing.com

## Services
- [Food Processing Wastewater Treatment Solutions for Food & Beverage Industry](https://mixing.com/feeds/service/food-processing-industry-wastewater-treatment-solutions): Transform your food and beverage facility's wastewater challenges into opportunities with Mixing Systems' advanced jet aeration and mixing technology. Our specialized solutions deliver superior treatment efficiency for high-organic-load wastewater from meat processing, dairy operations, brewing facilities, and other food production environments, ensuring regulatory compliance while reducing energy costs compared to conventional systems.
- [Expert Mixing Tank Solutions for Water Treatment](https://mixing.com/feeds/service/mixing-tank-water-treatment): Transform your water treatment operations with advanced mixing tank solutions engineered for maximum efficiency and reliability. Our custom-designed jet aeration and mixing systems deliver superior oxygen transfer, thorough solids suspension, and energy savings up to 40% over conventional methods. With hundreds of installations worldwide serving municipal facilities and industrial plants, we provide proven technology backed by over 40 years of engineering expertise to optimize your water treatment processes.
- [Expert Poultry Wastewater Treatment for Meat Processing Environmental Solutions](https://mixing.com/feeds/service/poultry-wastewater-treatment): Tackle the unique challenges of poultry processing wastewater with advanced jet aeration and mixing systems engineered for high organic loads, fats, and proteins. Our proven solutions deliver superior oxygen transfer efficiency, thorough solids suspension, and energy savings up to 40%, ensuring your facility meets strict environmental regulations while reducing operational costs in demanding meat processing environments.

## Categories
- [Full Scale Hydraulic Mixers Industrial Equipment](https://mixing.com/feeds/category/full-scale-hydraulic-mixers): Full-scale hydraulic mixers provide efficient, maintenance-free mixing for large industrial tanks. These jet mixing systems use high-velocity hydraulic jets to entrain fluid, creating powerful circulation and thorough mixing without in-basin moving parts. Ideal for tanks over 10,000 gallons and depths up to 65 feet, they serve wastewater treatment, chemical processing, food manufacturing, oil storage, and mining applications with 20+ year operational lifespans.
- [Industrial Tank Diffusers for Aeration Systems](https://mixing.com/feeds/category/industrial-tank-diffuser-aeration): Industrial tank diffusers for aeration systems deliver energy-efficient oxygen transfer in wastewater treatment facilities, chemical plants, and industrial processes. These jet aeration systems generate fine micron-size bubbles through hydraulic shearing, offering superior oxygen transfer efficiency with energy reductions up to 40% compared to conventional diffused aeration methods. With no in-basin moving parts and optional backflush systems, these diffusers provide virtually maintenance-free operation for deep tanks up to 65 feet.
- [Water Tank Aeration System for Optimal Results](https://mixing.com/feeds/category/water-tank-aeration-system): Water tank aeration systems deliver oxygen efficiently into water storage and treatment tanks through advanced jet aeration technology. These systems use hydraulic shearing to produce micron-sized bubbles that maximize oxygen transfer rates while minimizing energy consumption. Designed for municipal and industrial applications, they provide superior mixing capabilities, flexible system control, and maintenance-free operation for tanks ranging from 10 to 65 feet deep.
